title: GPS & Last Death
description: Navigate with an in-game GPS: cyan route on the terrain, homes, commands — stay on track without leaving Minecraft.
body:
Never guess your route again. This client-side Fabric mod draws a clear cyan path from where you stand to your destination — over hills, around obstacles when pathfinding can load the terrain — so you always know where to go.

![exemple of path create by GPS in a cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/700f5c8a578f5cf25d47356bca368cccd80f7b74_0.webp)

What you get

/gps <x> <z> or /gps to <x> <y> <z> — set a goal and follow the line on the ground (and in the air when you fly).
Homes — save spots with /gps sethome, recall them with /gps home, manage them from /gps gui or /gps homelist.
Options — refresh timing, path detail, water avoidance, optional straight “fly-style” routes, and language (FR/EN).
Map lovers — optional sync of homes to Xaero’s Minimap as waypoints when the map mod is installed.
Respect the server — some areas use NoGPS signs: when one matters for your route, the path hides and you get a clear heads-up.

Lightweight, readable, and built for survival and multiplayer exploration.
